payload.description: Memory topics in the FeedbackAnalysis report are missing recency indicators. The original semantic reinforcement memory system tracked days_inactive for each topic. The backend should compute days_inactive (days since a topic last received new documents) and include it in the topic output. The frontend TopicList component already supports days_inactive in its interface and will render a badge automatically. In plexus/reports/blocks/feedback_analysis.py _run_memory_analysis, track last_seen timestamps per cluster and compute days_inactive when serializing topics to the output YAML.
payload.title: Add recency indicators to memory topics
